arts.ttl: Friday's League Two predictions including Gillingham vs. Cheltenham Town
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's League Two fixtures, including Gillingham vs. Cheltenham Town.

arts.ttl: Defender's best performance yet, Arkell Jude-Boyd's unbelievable goal and striving for more - Cheltenham Town boss Michael Flynn after Morecambe win
arts.sum: Competition has been good at the minute and we have got goals in us as well - it's been pleasing, but there is lots to improve on. We were making the subs, just before his goal and I am pleased for him because he does work his socks off and he's an important cog in the team.

Gillingham have won their last two league games 1-0 against Salford and MK Dons and have put themselves firmly back into the promotion fight. Cheltenham have also had good form recently winning their...
